name: Messa di Voce
pedagogy: On one sustained pitch, swell from near-silence up to full volume and back down to near-silence in a single smooth arc — the classic messa di voce. Trains breath/appoggio control and dynamic command. Plays as a follow-along: this exercise is about loudness on a steady pitch, which the app can't measure — it guides the pitch and you control the swell by ear. Try to keep the pitch from creeping sharp as you crescendo.
